gist.headline: Pruning the garden
gist.blurb: We've pruned a few inactive apps from the showcase to keep the garden fresh and healthy.
gist.summary: Automated cleanup of the community showcase to remove apps that are no longer accessible.
gist.impact: Ensures the community showcase remains a reliable directory of active projects.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Nomnom creature doing some garden maintenance. Polly prunes dead leaves (representing dead links) from a code-plant, and Nomnom eats the scraps.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, gently pruning dead leaves from a glowing code-plant. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats the fallen leaves. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, gently pruning dead leaves from a glowing code-plant. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats the fallen leaves. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley.
